name: com.deucarian.xr-ui
description: Standalone XR-ready uGUI pressable controls, world canvas helpers, poke affordances, and neutral visual settings.

samples.description: Runtime-created uGUI examples for Deucarian XR UI buttons, toggles, sliders, and dropdowns.
Optional adapter notes for wiring Unity XR Interaction Toolkit Spatial Keyboard samples to press-gated XR UI controls.
